What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A man with short dark hair wears black sunglasses and a lime green cycling jersey with black patterns. He stands before a white building structure and dense green bush initially. Later, he crouches beside a green bicycle frame placed near a white ping pong table. He holds a blue tool against the bicycle components while adjusting the front wheel area.

Describe the sequence of actions performed by the man wearing the lime green jersey throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a man in a lime green jersey stands before a white building; at 6s, he looks down while standing still; at 14s, the scene changes and he holds a blue object in his hand; at 16s, he applies the blue tool against a green bicycle frame; at 18s, he crouches to adjust the front wheel of the bicycle.
